meta.title: MiTepuy | Premium Digital Presence for Real Estate Agents
meta.description: MiTepuy empowers independent real estate agents through professional profiles, visual portfolios and a premium experience designed to inspire trust.

hero.eyebrow: Digital infrastructure for real estate agents
hero.title: Turn your real estate profile into a trusted brand
hero.description: We create digital experiences designed to elevate the agent’s professional perception, strengthen their reputation and facilitate more trustworthy connections with potential buyers and investors.

about.title: Infrastructure for modern agents.
about.description_1: MiTepuy helps real estate agents build a more elegant, organized and professional digital presence through premium profiles, visual portfolios and experiences designed to inspire greater trust within the real estate market.
about.description_2: A stronger digital presence can help you stand out in a highly competitive market, create more trustworthy connections and increase your business opportunities with potential buyers and investors.

card_1.title: Perception matters
card_1.description: The way you present your profile directly influences the trust you communicate within the real estate market.

card_2.title: Your properties communicate
card_2.description: An organized and professional visual presentation can help you stand out in a competitive market.

card_3.title: Trust begins earlier
card_3.description: Clear, visual and well-structured profiles help communicate stronger professionalism and reputation.

card_4.title: Standing out is no longer optional
card_4.description: Agents with stronger digital presence create more solid, memorable and trustworthy experiences for their clients.

experience.title: Visual organization for premium agents.
experience.description_1: MiTepuy organizes profiles, properties and portfolios within a modern, clean and visually professional digital experience.
experience.description_2: Each agent has a dedicated space designed to present listings with greater clarity, presence and reputation.
experience.description_3: The platform prioritizes visual organization, professional identity and direct connection between agents and clients.

how_it_works.title: From independent agent to professional brand.
how_it_works.description_1: We create a clear digital structure so each agent can present their identity, experience, listings and contact channels within a single professional space.
how_it_works.description_2: Each profile is designed to organize information, elevate visual perception and help potential clients discover the agent with greater confidence.
how_it_works.description_3: The result is a more serious, coherent and shareable experience designed to help agents stand out in an increasingly visual market.

agents.title: Next-generation real estate profiles.
agents.description: Each agent is part of a digital experience designed to communicate greater trust, organization and reputation within the real estate market.

demo.title: MiTepuy Demo Profile
demo.description: Discover a premium real estate experience designed to elevate your professional image.
demo.highlight: A real example of the visual standard MiTepuy creates for its agents.

vision.title: A new way to build reputation.
vision.description_1: MiTepuy was created as a digital infrastructure focused on transforming how independent agents present their image, experience and portfolio within the real estate market.
vision.description_2: Our vision is to promote a more organized, trustworthy and visually professional experience where digital presence becomes a real tool for reputation, positioning and trust.

contact.title: Let’s Talk!
contact.description_1: Whether you are a real estate agent, property owner or investor, MiTepuy can help you build more organized, professional connections aligned with a higher-level digital experience.
contact.description_2: Our team can guide you, help you find professional profiles within the platform or provide information about becoming part of the MiTepuy ecosystem.

form.title: Contact Us
form.message: Tell us how we can help you

footer.description: Digital infrastructure focused on strengthening the professional presence of independent real estate agents through branding, visual organization and more trustworthy digital experiences.
footer.signature: Designed to elevate digital real estate presence.

agents_data.name: Marianela Castillo
agents_data.description: Specialist in premium properties and real estate opportunities in Anzoátegui state.

agents_data.name: Andrea Salazar
agents_data.description: Real estate advisor focused on family properties and investment opportunities.

agents_data.name: Carlos Méndez
agents_data.description: Real estate agent specialized in residential, commercial and premium assets.

agents_data.name: Valeria Rivas
agents_data.description: Real estate advisor focused on vacation properties, investments and waterfront assets.

need_agent.title: Find the right agent.
need_agent.description_1: If you want to sell, rent or promote a property, MiTepuy can help you find real estate agents with organized digital presence, professional visual experience and a stronger image within the market.
need_agent.description_2: Our goal is to facilitate more trustworthy connections between property owners, investors and independent agents through a carefully presented network focused on elevating the digital real estate experience.
need_agent.description_3: We can guide you and show you professional profiles within our platform to help you find the most suitable agent according to your city, property type and needs.
